# Ike Terms

> The IkeFoundation ledger: declared stamps inline, edits under each, authored with
> the chronology builders. Replay is verified over the in-memory store; the
> change-set module consumes this ledger.

## Other

- [Dependencies (SBOM)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-terms/dependencies.html.md)
- [Licenses (SPDX)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-terms/licenses.html.md)
- [Built With](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-terms/built-with.html.md)
